productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Valle Black Casual Shoes
description: When you have the desire to hang out in style, slip into the Valle casual shoes from buckaroo, and you'll easily be the most stylish person at the gathering! These smart lace-ups are not just great-looking, but also lightweight and comfortable. Pair them with your best pair of jeans and a smart tee to look like a fashionista. Upper Full grain leather upper for added durability and style Stitch detailing for added structure and style Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Lightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fit Brand badge on tongue Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers for lightweight comfort Well-cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Woven fabric lining for extra comfort Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Oval lugs all over the outsole for better grip and traction on all surfaces shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
